pattern_formula: [Specialty] WARNS: If Your [Body Part] [Symptom] After 60, [Hidden Cause]
example: Neurologist WARNS: If Your LEGS Feel HEAVY After 60, Your Body Is Missing 1 Critical Vitamin
Signs of a Stroke 24 Hours Before the Attack
These FOUR Cheeses You Must NEVER Eat After 60

pattern_formula: [Disease Name]: How It Spreads and Why It's Dangerous for Seniors
example: Hantavirus: How It Spreads and Why It Kills So Fast

pattern_formula: You Could Live [X] More Years After [Age] – [Action]
example: You Could Live 30 More Years After 65 – Try Doing This In The Morning
5 Blood Tests Your Doctor Won't Order (But Could Save Your Life)

pattern_formula: [Common Symptom] After 60 Is NOT [Common Belief] — It's [True Cause]
example: SWOLLEN ANKLES AFTER 60 ARE NOT YOUR HEART — It's Your Lymph
10 Fruits That Reverse Blood Sugar | 5 Worst to Avoid
STOP Eating These 4 Common Fish After 60 (Causing Stroke)

pattern_formula: This [Food Item] Makes Your [Body Part] [Physical Adjective] After 60 — Doctor Explains
example: This Breakfast Makes Your Arteries Stiff After 60 — Doctor Explains

pattern_formula: Why Your [Body Function] Gets Worse After 60 — The [Number] Systems [Verb]
example: Why Your Balance Gets Worse After 60 — The 3 Systems Failing

pattern_formula: Why Your [Body Part/Function] [Symptom] After 60 — The [Hidden Mechanism] Secret
example: Why Your Hair Thins After 60 — The Scalp Blood Flow Secret

pattern_formula: Your [Body Function] Dropped [X]% After [Age] — Here's What It Does to [Consequence]
example: Your Stomach Acid Dropped 40% After 60 — Here's What It Does to Your Meds

pattern_formula: Your [Lab Value] Looks Normal After [Age] — But Your [Body Part] Are [Suffering Verb]
example: Your Iron Levels Look Normal After 60 — But Your Cells Are Starving

pattern_formula: The [Lab Test] Mask: Why Your [Test Name] [Fails Verb] After [Age]
example: The Ferritin Mask: Why Your Iron Test Lies After 60
